title: REPLACE on table with generated NOT NULL column results in segfault
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 NOT NULL AS(c1), c1);
description:
mrigger added on 2019-11-05 22:31:26:
The following testcase causes a segfault:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 NOT NULL AS(c1), c1);
REPLACE INTO t0(c1) VALUES(NULL); -- Segmentation fault
key_bug_features: REPLACE with NULL on generated NOT NULL column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 NOT NULL AS(c1), c1 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2(c2 TEXT NOT NULL, c3 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO t2(c2, c3) VALUES('test', NULL);
